sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The green bar shrank. Let me check the current state to see if the red dot moved up.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check red dot position after shrinking green bar
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Red dots:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'r':
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"  {n['pixels']}px at ({b[0][0]}, {b[0][1]})")

print("\nGreen bar:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 7:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['pixels']}px, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The red dot moved from (46, 40) to (43, 40) - it moved UP by 3 rows. So shrinking the green bar moves the red dot up. The cross is at (31, 52), so the dot still needs to move up 12 rows and right 12 cols.
The green bar is now 50px (was 59px), rows 28-44. I need to shrink it more to move the red dot up.
But I also need to move the red dot right. The yellow bar grows rightward, so I need to grow the yellow bar.
Let me think about the relationship between bar sizes and red dot position:
- Red dot is at the bottom of the green bar (vertical part of L-shape)
- Green bar rows 28-44, red dot at row 43 (near bottom)
- To move red dot up, shrink green bar
- To move red dot right, grow yellow bar (horizontal part)
But wait, the red dot is at col 40, and the cross is at col 52. The yellow bar is at cols 25-38. Growing the yellow bar extends it rightward, but does it move the red dot right?
Let me think about the L-shape structure:
- Yellow bar is horizontal, at the top of the L-shape
- Green bar is vertical, at the right side of the L-shape
- The red dot is at the bottom of the green bar
Growing the yellow bar extends it rightward, which might extend the green bar rightward too (since they're connected).
Let me try growing the yellow bar and see if the red dot moves right.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Red dot at (43, 40), cross at (31, 52)
# Need to move up 12, right 12
# Shrink green to move up, grow yellow to move right
# Let me try a sequence: shrink green, grow yellow

action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 51},  # green shrink
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 42},  # yellow grow
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 51},  # green shrink
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 42},  # yellow grow
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
